description: A charming family home in the heart of Engcobo, offering generous living spaces, a private balcony, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Ideal for first-time buyers or investors seeking a well-proportioned property in a peaceful setting.

hall.description: A welcoming entrance hall that sets the tone for the rest of the home. Bright and airy, it provides a seamless transition between the front door and the living spaces beyond.

kitchen.description: A well-appointed kitchen designed for both everyday cooking and entertaining. Generous counter space and a practical layout make meal preparation a pleasure, with room for all your modern appliances.

bathroom.description: A clean, modern bathroom finished to a high standard. Thoughtfully designed to maximise space, it offers everything you need to start and end your day in comfort and style.

bedroom.description: A spacious and tranquil bedroom bathed in natural light. With ample room for a double bed and storage, this is a true retreat at the end of the day — peaceful, private, and full of potential.

lounge.description: An expansive open-plan lounge that is the heart of the home. Perfect for relaxing or hosting guests, the generous proportions and natural light create a warm and inviting atmosphere you will love coming home to.

balcony.description: Step outside onto this charming balcony and enjoy sweeping views of the surrounding area. Whether you are sipping your morning coffee or unwinding at sunset, this outdoor space adds a touch of luxury to everyday living.
